night.label: Ночная тема
app_stylesheet: QTextEdit, QPlainTextEdit { background-color:#1d2734; border:1px solid #222f3d; border-radius:6px; color:#dee6f1; selection-background-color:#59b7e9; selection-color:#0b141d; }
QLineEdit { background-color:#1d2734; border:1px solid #222f3d; border-radius:6px; padding:4px 8px; color:#dee6f1; selection-background-color:#59b7e9; selection-color:#0b141d; }
QPushButton, QToolButton, QComboBox { background-color:#1d2734; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius:6px; padding:6px 10px; color:#dee6f1; }
QProgressBar { background-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius:4px; text-align:center; }
QToolTip { color:#f7f9ff; background-color:#1b2433; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); }

styles.chat_sidebar.folder_title: font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:#d0d9e6; padding:0; margin:0; text-align:center; background:transparent;
styles.main.streamer_overlay: background-color: rgba(14, 22, 33, 0.92); color:#f7f9ff; font-size:16px; font-weight:600; border-radius:16px; padding:20px;
styles.settings.toggle_row.label: color:#dfe6f0; font-size:13px;
styles.settings.drawer.title: font-size:16px; font-weight:600; color:#f7f9fc;
styles.settings.drawer.scroll: QScrollArea { border:none; } QScrollArea > QWidget > QWidget { background-color:transparent; } QScrollBar:vertical { background-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.02); width:4px; margin:0; border-radius:2px; } QScrollBar::handle:vertical { background-color:rgba(200,213,227,0.7); border-radius:2px; min-height:30px; } QScrollBar::add-line:vertical, QScrollBar::sub-line:vertical { height:0; } QScrollBar::add-page:vertical, QScrollBar::sub-page:vertical { background:transparent; }
styles.settings.account.name: font-size:13px; color:#f1f4fb; font-weight:600;
styles.settings.section.caption: color:#8ea0bf; font-size:12px;
styles.settings.color_chip: background-color:$color; color:#0b111a; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); padding:4px 10px; border-radius:4px;
styles.animation_demo.bubble: QFrame#bubble { background:$bubble_bg; color:$bubble_fg; border-radius:14px; }QFrame#bubble QLabel { color:$bubble_fg; }
styles.message.bubble.label: #bubble QLabel{color:$text; background-color:transparent;}#bubble QLabel a{color:$link; text-decoration:none;}
styles.message.deleted.label: color:#ff9aa0;font-size:11px;
styles.message.hidden.label: color:#9fa6b1;font-size:11px;
styles.message.status.label: color:#9fa6b1;font-size:11px;
styles.message.audio.voice_button: QToolButton { background-color:rgba(89,183,233,0.18); border:none; border-radius:20px; padding:6px 10px; color:#59b7e9; font-size:18px; }QToolButton:hover { background-color:rgba(89,183,233,0.28); }
styles.message.audio.title: color:#f4f7ff;font-weight:bold;
styles.message.document.title: color:#f4f7ff;font-weight:600;font-size:13px;
styles.message.caption: font-size:13px;
styles.style_editor.advanced_box:
QGroupBox { background-color:#0f1a25; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius:10px; margin-top:12px; }
QGroupBox::title { color:#dfe6f0; subcontrol-origin: margin; left:14px; padding:0 6px; font-weight:600; }
styles.style_editor.color_button: border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius:8px; padding:6px 12px; font-weight:600; text-align:left;

message_widgets.quote_block_style: margin:4px 0; padding-left:8px; border-left:3px solid rgba(89,183,233,0.45); color:#c4d4eb;

day.label: Дневная тема
app_stylesheet: QLineEdit, QTextEdit, QPlainTextEdit { background-color:#ffffff; border:1px solid rgba(27,31,42,0.14); border-radius:6px; selection-background-color:#3390ec; selection-color:#ffffff; }
QToolButton, QPushButton, QComboBox { background-color:#ffffff; border:1px solid rgba(27,31,42,0.14); border-radius:6px; padding:6px 10px; }
QToolTip { color:#1b1f2a; background-color:#ffffff; border:1px solid rgba(27,31,42,0.15); }

styles.chat_sidebar.folder_title: font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:#2b2f3a; padding:0; margin:0; text-align:center; background:transparent;
styles.main.streamer_overlay: background-color: rgba(240, 240, 240, 0.95); color:#151515; font-size:16px; font-weight:600; border-radius:16px; padding:20px;
styles.settings.toggle_row.label: color:#1e2128; font-size:13px;
styles.settings.drawer.title: font-size:16px; font-weight:600; color:#20242a;
styles.settings.drawer.scroll: QScrollArea { border:none; } QScrollArea > QWidget > QWidget { background-color:transparent; } QScrollBar:vertical { background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.04); width:4px; margin:0; border-radius:2px; } QScrollBar::handle:vertical { background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.35); border-radius:2px; min-height:30px; } QScrollBar::add-line:vertical, QScrollBar::sub-line:vertical { height:0; } QScrollBar::add-page:vertical, QScrollBar::sub-page:vertical { background:transparent; }
styles.settings.account.name: font-size:13px; color:#20242a; font-weight:600;
styles.settings.section.caption: color:#4a505d; font-size:12px;
styles.settings.color_chip: background-color:$color; color:#0b111a; border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.15); padding:4px 10px; border-radius:4px;
styles.animation_demo.bubble: QFrame#bubble { background:$bubble_bg; color:$bubble_fg; border-radius:14px; }QFrame#bubble QLabel { color:$bubble_fg; }
styles.message.bubble.label: #bubble QLabel{color:$text; background-color:transparent;}#bubble QLabel a{color:$link; text-decoration:none;}
styles.message.deleted.label: color:#c0392b;font-size:11px;
styles.message.hidden.label: color:#6b7280;font-size:11px;
styles.message.status.label: color:#6b7280;font-size:11px;
styles.message.audio.voice_button: QToolButton { background-color:rgba(51,144,236,0.12); border:none; border-radius:20px; padding:6px 10px; color:#3390ec; font-size:18px; }QToolButton:hover { background-color:rgba(51,144,236,0.18); }
styles.message.audio.title: font-weight:bold;
styles.message.document.title: font-weight:600;font-size:13px;
styles.message.caption: font-size:13px;
styles.style_editor.advanced_box:
QGroupBox { background-color:#202020; border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.45); border-radius:10px; margin-top:12px; }
QGroupBox::title { color:#f3f3f3; subcontrol-origin: margin; left:14px; padding:0 6px; font-weight:600; }
styles.style_editor.color_button: border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius:8px; padding:6px 12px; font-weight:600; text-align:left;

message_widgets.quote_block_style: margin:4px 0; padding-left:8px; border-left:3px solid rgba(89,183,233,0.45); color:#c4d4eb;
